textByHash.006fca56ada4778d9cd3fe4330539879ed9e2592: After many long years, it is time for Arrav to take command of my zombie troops. And on that note, come, let us inspect the forces.
textByHash.0249eabf2bdfb3ab8402333c14c86e2ecee0fc69: What a miserable failure you are. Sharathteerk, get rid of him.
textByHash.132e1be0092ce7ef315e3b65f16f673ba401d255: Then recall Arrav at once! There is nothing more to be gained here. It is time for us to head north.
textByHash.275f3754a49888a7b9f220acff737644d8195dc4: Soon, the Mahjarrat will hold dominion over these lands once more. Varrock will be mine. Arrav cannot save his people this time. He can only watch as he himself seals their fate!
textByHash.2a119474cb57810f7ced277816afae275ccdc457: Besides, Lucien isn't the only one with powerful resources...
textByHash.2ddf12e53ccb51312d0268f9da9d2aaf7297449f: Nonsense! The mist has no side effects. Besides, it's essential for the new security system. Everyone needs to be imbued with it if they wish to pass through any doors or gates in the base.
textByHash.3344b043e781e131164762b3d22fa14fd0468b7a: And what do we have here? Now, this is interesting... A snooping adventurer!
textByHash.33fe23bc7b9b4267c2a4f65d912de7691137b23c: Did you really think you had any hope of stealing that heart?
textByHash.4a6c6a1342a8b7bbc573c3f93bb17ffd77762e6e: Then let us waste no more time. Begin the final preparations.
textByHash.52ca688f745dab60285a30f269272e0b3bbba26e: Enough! I don't have time to worry about fairy tales.
textByHash.6f6771feeacdafa8b357c9a198d0dcd29c31327c: Combine forces? I won't hear of it! Lucien would never enter into such an arrangement unless he were the one in control, and I have no desire to serve at his behest.
textByHash.75af6c53188d53797ace9db3fedf608c6bd9be7d: What do we do? We flee, you fool!
textByHash.77183bdc425aa470b23071c4855d21b79d94d2ea: Now, what news do you bring from the north?
textByHash.a0040e98a0c424259d4484d7c740fa48512f63b9: Well, look what we have here...
textByHash.a21102098e8fcf36110e00d1a059f17781f028d8: If that is the fate Lucien wishes for himself, then he is welcome to it. In the meantime, we will focus on more practical endeavours. This is our last chance before the time comes to head north.
textByHash.a81507521c5f617d193d4560dcb273ef3de7f9c2: So you hope to stop me do you, you pathetic human wretch? Well my zombie army is at the walls of Varrock. You are already too late!
textByHash.b06eb70b24a6898d44c7e3855eb50bce8fd74c3e: Do you not think that I am all too aware of the power? You couldn't begin to imagine what I'd do to have it for myself! But I am also all too aware of what happens to those who try to claim it.
textByHash.bb4e78f4ba60e77d49e209eebcec7ff655018462: Do you have a better suggestion? Are you hiding some secret to overcoming such an astounding disaster?
